title: bot: Response events discarded with no logging
description: In main.rs lines 196-198, all ClientEvent::Response messages are silently ignored with no logging. The bot sends BROADCAST and SET_NICKNAME commands that may generate responses, but they are discarded. This violates error discipline—we cannot distinguish between 'relay sent no response' and 'we discarded it'. Correct: log responses at debug level or implement request ID tracking to match responses to requests.
